Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/149d2014d9ee13154874bf4b4bc6a2249099f9dcd7610217ce3b1d8debd97287/71e7da44-8416-4c1a-a79a-387fa9e9ab12/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
